_comment: Snippet to merge into your MCP client config (e.g. claude_desktop_config.json).

ghidra-headless._comment: Talks to the headless ghidra-mcp HTTP server started by entrypoint.sh on :8089

shell._comment: Generic shell — all CLI tools: angr, AFL++, honggfuzz, bindiff, apktool, jadx, gcc, etc.
